mapper.sql: id, server_task_id, task_type, fund_code_count, source_type, source_ref_id, status, agent_task_ref, error_summary, callback_diagnostic_status, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE processing_task SET status = #{status}, agent_task_ref = #{agentTaskRef}, error_summary = #{errorSummary}, callback_diagnostic_status = #{callbackDiagnosticStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE server_task_id = #{serverTaskId}
